Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings","content":"Jan 30, 2026 — Revenue for the fourth quarter of 2025 was $472.6 million compared to revenue of $375.4 million for the fourth quarter of 2024, an increase of ...Read more
Revenue for the fourth quarter of 2025 was $472.6 million compared to revenue of $375.4 million for the fourth quarter of 2024, an increase of 25.9%.
For the year ended December 31, 2025, the Company reported net income of $148.4 million or $14.13 basic earnings per share compared with net income of $71.6 million or $6.91 basic earnings per share for the year ended December 31, 2024, an increase of 107.4%.
AUM of $55.2 billion reached record levels at December 31, 2025, which is the basis for advisory fee billings for January 2026
The $5.8 billion increase in AUM from December 31, 2024 to December 31, 2025 was largely due to higher asset values resulting from market appreciation
Compensation expenses increased 6.2% from the prior year period primarily due to greater production-related expenses
The Board of Directors announced a quarterly dividend in the amount of $0.18 per share for the fourth quarter of 2025 payable on February 27, 2026 to holders of Class A non-voting and Class B voting common stock of record on February 13, 2026

Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings — TradingView News","content":"# Oppenheimer Holdings Inc. Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings. Oppenheimer Holdings Inc., a leading middle market investment bank and full-service broker-dealer, has released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. For the fourth quarter of 2025, Oppenheimer Holdings Inc. reported a net income of $74.4 million, or $7.08 basic earnings per share, a substantial increase from $10.7 million, or $1.04 basic earnings per share, in the fourth quarter of 2024. Revenue for the quarter rose by 25.9% to $472.6 million, compared to $375.4 million in the same period last year. For the full year ended December 31, 2025, the company reported net income of $148.4 million, or $14.13 basic earnings per share, up from $71.6 million, or $6.91 basic earnings per share, in 2024. The Wealth Management segment reported a revenue increase of 13.3% for the fourth quarter, reaching $287.3 million, with pre-tax income rising by 84.0% to $98.8 million.","score":0.94608605,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/oppenheimer-holdings-inc-reports-fourth-quarter-and-full-year-2025-earnings-302674542.html","title":"Oppenheimer Holdings Inc.
